execution_forensics.noise_stop_pct: 50.8% of SL hits at conf>75 in noisy regimes
execution_forensics.instant_sl_rate: 89% same-candle SL closes — stop width 0.86% avg vs 1.2%+ needed

duration_h_bug.root_cause: 89% same-candle SL: sim_dt used for both open+close timestamps. hold_time_s=0 for most trades.
duration_h_bug.fix_description: Add max(actual_hold, candle_duration_s) floor in position_manager.py:1398. Patch pos.opened_at=sim_dt in engine.py alongside open_time.

output.noise_stop_problem: 89% instant SL — stop too tight (0.86% avg needs 1.2%+)

dataset_conflict.description: 100d backtest vs 965-trade dataset contradict on 80-90% conf bin
dataset_conflict.action_needed: Temporal split of 965-trade set (early vs recent halves) to confirm regime shift

swap_recommendation.change: Haiku -> Sonnet for REGIME_SHIFT trigger only

model_optimization.note: Theoretical — bot offline, no live call data.

high_priority_findings.detail: Zero live trading. trades.csv missing. Feedback loops stalled. 72 days without execution = est. $57,600-$86,400 in missed backtest-equivalent returns at $800-1,200/day.

high_priority_findings.finding: NEGATIVE EDGE: Kelly=-0.167 (structural R:R deficit) — 3 consecutive runs
high_priority_findings.detail: Avg win $82.72 < avg loss $91.27. Win/loss 0.91 at 44.5% WR = -$1,384 expected per 100 trades. Requires SL widening on HYPE (1.5x ATR min). File: bot/trading_config.py (ATR_SL_MULTIPLIER_HYPE).
high_priority_findings.action: Code change: widen HYPE SL to 1.5x ATR minimum. bot/trading_config.py

high_priority_findings.detail: 89% of SL hits are same-candle closes (hold_time_s=0). HoldTimeRuleManager's 3h minimum is neutered. Backtest hold-time learning is broken. Root cause: sim_dt used for both open and close timestamps. Fix: bot/execution/position_manager.py:1398 (add candle_duration_s floor) + bot/backtest/engine.py:~1941 (patch opened_at=sim_dt).
high_priority_findings.action: Code fix: max(actual_hold, candle_duration_s) in position_manager.py:1398. Also patch engine.py:~1941.

high_priority_findings.finding: HYPE_SHORT veto inversion unresolved — confidence 71% blocks auto-apply (3 runs)
high_priority_findings.detail: HYPE SHORT <75% conf = 52-60% WR +$8-15/trade (n=80 trades, +$808 in 100d). HYPE SHORT >=75% = 31.2% WR -$70.06/trade (n=77). Blanket veto blocks the profitable sub-condition. Awaiting confidence bump to 75% or live confirmation (n>=20 trades).
high_priority_findings.action: Monitor — will auto-apply when confidence >= 75%. Manual override available with user approval.

high_priority_findings.detail: 100d backtest: 80-90% conf = 40% WR (-$33/trade). Full 965-trade set: 80-90% conf = 60.2% WR (+$7.67/trade). Direct contradiction. Likely a temporal regime shift in confidence calibration. Cannot apply CONF_PARADOX expansion until temporal split analysis done.
high_priority_findings.action: Split 965-trade set by date (early vs recent halves). Confirm if confidence degraded after ~100 days ago.
